headline.purpose: Section titles, especially on dark instrument sections.

label.purpose: Data, code, axis ticks, metadata. Geist Mono only.

shadows.name: hairline-lift
shadows.purpose: Barely-there separation on the light field: rating pill, resting cards, nav CTA.

shadows.name: standing
shadows.purpose: Primary/secondary buttons and active dark-section CTAs.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Genuinely floating elements only: hero decor cards, dropdown panel, tooltips, card hover.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Entrance reveals and hero choreography (fade-up, float-in).

motion.name: float-loop
motion.purpose: Slow infinite y-drift on floating hero spec cards (5.5-7s range).

motion.name: path-draw
motion.purpose: SVG pathLength line-draw for telemetry charts.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Signal Orange fill, deepens to Ember on hover, subtle press-in.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #e77725; color: #ffffff; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c9651a; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1d3fab; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-emphasis CTA on the light field. Bordered, paper fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ffffff; color: #2c2c2e; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: 1px solid #d4d4d4; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease, transform 0.12s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #9f9f9f; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1d3fab; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Accent Button (Dark)
components.description: Pill CTA used on dark instrument sections, with a sliding arrow chip.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #1d3fab; color: #ffffff; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #508ff3; } .ds-btn-accent__chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.2); transition: transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-accent:hover .ds-btn-accent__chip { transform: translateX(0.25rem); }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-block; background: #e77725; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.12s ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #c9651a; } .ds-nav-cta:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Resting card on the light field: flat with a hairline border, lifts on hover.
components.html:
FINTECH OPTIMIZATION

Real case studies with real results.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; background: #f6f0ed; border: 1px solid #ebebeb; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.25); } .ds-card__tag { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9f9f9f; } .ds-card__title { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.375; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0; }

components.name: Data Chip
components.description: Positive-delta telemetry chip; Circuit Green on a tint. Reserved for real metrics.
components.css: .ds-chip-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgb(130 205 37 / 0.15); color: #4d7a14; padding: 0.125rem 0.25rem; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: Stack360 is a custom software architecture studio, and the site reads like a spec sheet drawn by someone who ships. The dominant surface is a clean, near-paper light field where structure, data, and typography carry the weight, punctuated by one warm, load-bearing orange that behaves like a highlighter on a technical drawing. Depth is engineered, not decorative: most surfaces sit flat, and elevation appears only where an element is genuinely lifted or where the narrative drops into a dark instrumentation section for case-study telemetry. Evidence beats adjectives: real charts, real metrics, precise system copy.
keyCharacteristics: Light, near-paper base with a single committed warm-orange accent.
Dark instrumentation sections for data-heavy proof (case studies, telemetry).
Geist Sans for voice, Geist Mono for data/labels — the sans/mono contrast is the type system.
Flat by default; shadow only signals genuine lift.
Tight radii (4-16px) and choreographed, intentional motion.

rules.name: The One Orange Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange is the only accent that carries brand voice, and it stays under ~10% of any light screen. Its scarcity is what makes it read as important, not loud. Blueprint Blue is the data voice, not a second brand color.

rules.name: The Two-Field Rule
rules.body: The site lives in exactly two worlds: the light paper field (marketing voice) and the dark instrument field (proof/telemetry). Don't invent a third mid-gray surface.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Data Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono is reserved for things that are literally data or code (labels, chart axes, tooltips, code snippets). It is never used as body copy or as generic techy decoration.

rules.name: The Earned-Shadow Rule
rules.body: A shadow must correspond to real lift. Surfaces are flat at rest; shadow-card is the signal that something is floating above the plane, not a decoration for every card.

dos: Do keep Signal Orange (#e77725) as the single brand accent, under ~10% of any light screen.
Do use Geist Mono strictly for data/labels/code, and Geist Sans for everything spoken.
Do keep the light field flat with 1px borders; reserve shadow-card for genuinely floating or dark-section elements.
Do prove claims with real charts, metrics, and precise system copy — evidence over adjectives.
Do drop into the dark instrument field (#171717) for data-heavy proof, and keep marketing voice on the light field.
Do keep display headings <=4rem, letter-spacing >= -0.04em, and body measure at 65-75ch.
donts: Don't ship the generic digital-agency template: stock hero + identical icon-feature card grids + logo soup.
Don't lean on AI-slop grammar: tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows over every section, 01/02/03 numbered section markers, or the hero-metric template.
Don't use gradient background-clip: text for emphasis; emphasize with weight, size, or the solid Signal Orange instead.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively — backdrop-blur is only for the one floating hero card.
Don't set body text in Muted #9f9f9f; it fails contrast on the light field. Use Quiet #737373 or darker.
Don't default the body background to beige/cream warmth; warmth comes from the orange accent and typography, not the surface.
Don't add a third mid-gray surface world or a second brand accent color.
